full_text:
Huo Jun (Zhongmiao) 霍峻 (仲邈)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huo Jun (霍峻), styledZhongmiao (仲邈), was born in Zhi Jiang, Nanjun. Held Jiameng against Liu Zhang’s generals before defeating them. Huo Jun was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Shu Kingdom. Huo Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
